---
title: "trace_viz.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\trace_viz.py"
loc: 207
complexity: 28
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 2.95
overall_score: 1.41
---

## Intent
The `trace_viz.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on TraceRenderer, __init__, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, render_neural_path, render_analysis, TraceVisualizer, load_json, get_engine, _res, mode_live, mode_file, mode_war_room. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TraceRenderer, __init__, box_top, box_row, box_separator, box_bottom, render_neural_path, render_analysis, TraceVisualizer, load_json, get_engine, _res, mode_live, mode_file, mode_war_room. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 52 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [glob](file://glob)
- [json](file://json)
- [math](file://math)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [collections](file://collections)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `TraceRenderer`
- `__init__`
- `box_top`
- `box_row`
- `box_separator`
- `box_bottom`
- `render_neural_path`
- `render_analysis`
- `TraceVisualizer`
- `load_json`
- `get_engine`
- `_res`
- `mode_live`
- `mode_file`
- `mode_war_room`
